title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: Effective date: 2026-03-22

title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: document defines stability commitments CatMapR’s current public interface.

title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: following exported functions considered stable receive breaking signature changes within current minor release line without migration path:

title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: following exported function public depends deployment support may lag behind package releases: getProperties() Current expectation: - getProperties() target API deployments exposing GET /metadata/properties/<database>. - production deployments expose route, callers may need point CATMAPR_API_URL (url) deployment .

title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: remove rename exported functions. rename existing arguments. change argument semantics way breaks valid existing calls. remove fields successful return payloads downstream scripts may depend . Bug fixes stricter validation allowed successful existing usage preserved.

title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: CatMapR currently calls API endpoints. Breaking changes endpoints avoided unless compatibility path provided: GET /CMID/{database}/{cmid} GET /allDatasets GET /dataset GET /search GET /getTranslatedomains GET /metadata/uploadProperties/<database> GET /metadata/properties/<database> POST /translate POST /joinDatasets POST /proposeMergeSubmit POST /uploadInputNodes POST /updateWaitingUSES (internal post-upload trigger used submitEditUpload())

title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: remove endpoints without introducing versioned replacements. change required parameter names types without backward compatibility. remove response fields already consumed CatMapR wrappers. behavior must change, ship additive changes first announce deprecation removal.

title: CatMapR API Stability Contract
text: migration plan, deprecation timeline, corresponding CatMapR release notes. Breaking changes deferred major version transition.

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
text: CatMapper platform organizing harmonizing category systems across datasets. currently includes two applications: SocioMap, focuses social-science categories (example ethnicities, languages, religions, administrative units), ArchaMap, focuses archaeological categories (example artifact types cultural periods). CatMapR API wrapper CatMapper API, package functions also available CatMapper web application https://catmapper.org. vignette shows standard CatMapR workflow: list available dataset metadata, inspect metadata helpers, search inspect categories, translate external labels, run basic quality checks, join harmonized tables. default, chunks run offline demo mode reproducible rendering.

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
text: Researchers often work datasets describe category systems different incompatible ways. CatMapper helps : identifying likely matches across naming variants coding systems, preserving context needed disambiguation (example place, domain, period), reducing manual harmonization effort analysis, making joins across independently structured datasets reproducible. CatMapR provides capabilities scriptable R workflows, translation, quality checks, joins can rerun consistently data updates.

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
text: CatMapR wrappers return CatMapper API responses, including: dataset catalog metadata (example CMID, CMName, citation fields, years), category/entity metadata relationship details, translation join outputs, metadata/property discovery tables. CatMapR fetch raw dataset source files managed outside CatMapper. User-owned/raw datasets external inputs R workflow.

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
text: routes like /:database/explore, :database means app path segment, sociomap archamap (example /sociomap/explore).

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
code: library(CatMapR)  # Optional API override: # Sys.setenv(CATMAPR_API_URL = "https://api.catmapper.org")  run_live #> [1] FALSE

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
text: Suggested pairings worked example: SocioMap ADM0: SD1 (GADM 3.6) + SD2 (GeoNames 202005) SocioMap ETHNICITY: SD2176 (GeoEPR 2021) + SD461930 (LEDA) SocioMap LANGUAGE: SD3 (Glottolog 4.2.1) + SD2196 (Wikidata) ArchaMap artifact/period: AD37767 (Andrefsky 2005) + AD37770 (DAI_FeatureTypes) Dataset IDs confirmed 2026-03-18 may change catalogs update.

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
code: if (run_live) {   datasets <- listDatasetMetadata(database = "SocioMap") } else {   datasets <- data.frame(     CMID = c("SD1", "SD2", "SD2176", "SD461930"),     CMName = c("GADM 3.6", "GeoNames Version 202005", "GeoEPR 2021", "LEDA"),     ApplicableYears = c("2018", "2020", "1946-2021", NA),     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   ) }  head(datasets) #>       CMID                  CMName ApplicableYears #> 1      SD1                GADM 3.6            2018 #> 2      SD2 GeoNames Version 202005            2020 #> 3   SD2176             GeoEPR 2021       1946-2021 #> 4 SD461930                    LEDA            <NA>

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
text: getProperties() also available deployments expose /metadata/properties/<database>, rollout timing may vary API deployment.
code: if (run_live) {   domains <- getDomains(database = "SocioMap")   upload_props <- getUploadProperties(database = "SocioMap") } else {   domains <- data.frame(     domain = c("DISTRICT", "DISTRICT", "ETHNICITY"),     subdomain = c("ADM0", "ADM1", "ETHNICITY"),     description = c("Administrative district", "Administrative district", "Ethnicity category"),     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   )   upload_props <- list(     database = "SocioMap",     nodeProperties = data.frame(property = "DatasetCitation", description = "Dataset citation", stringsAsFactors = FALSE),     usesProperties = data.frame(property = "yearStart", description = "Starting date", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)   ) }  head(domains) #>      domain subdomain             description #> 1  DISTRICT      ADM0 Administrative district #> 2  DISTRICT      ADM1 Administrative district #> 3 ETHNICITY ETHNICITY      Ethnicity category head(upload_props$nodeProperties) #>          property      description #> 1 DatasetCitation Dataset citation head(upload_props$usesProperties) #>    property   description #> 1 yearStart Starting date

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
code: if (run_live) {   hits <- searchDatabase(     database = "SocioMap",     domain = "ADM0",     term = "Ghana",     property = "Name"   )   details <- CMIDinfo(database = "SocioMap", cmid = "SM1") } else {   hits <- list(     count = 1,     data = data.frame(       CMID = "SM1",       CMName = "Ghana",       domain = "ADM0",       stringsAsFactors = FALSE     )   )   details <- list(node = list(CMID = "SM1", CMName = "Ghana", domain = "ADM0")) }  hits #> $count #> [1] 1 #>  #> $data #>   CMID CMName domain #> 1  SM1  Ghana   ADM0 str(details) #> List of 1 #>  $ node:List of 3 #>   ..$ CMID  : chr "SM1" #>   ..$ CMName: chr "Ghana" #>   ..$ domain: chr "ADM0"

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
code: raw_df <- data.frame(   country_label = c("Ghana", "Cote dIvoire", "Tanzania"),   year = c(2019, 2019, 2019),   indicator_value = c(10.2, 9.7, 8.4),   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  raw_df #>   country_label year indicator_value #> 1         Ghana 2019            10.2 #> 2  Cote dIvoire 2019             9.7 #> 3      Tanzania 2019             8.4

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
code: if (run_live) {   translated <- translate(     rows = raw_df,     database = "SocioMap",     domain = "ADM0",     term = "country_label",     property = "Name",     query = "false"   ) } else {   translated <- list(     file = data.frame(       country_label = c("Ghana", "Cote dIvoire", "Tanzania"),       generated_CMID = c("SM1", "SM2", "SM3"),       generated_CMName = c("Ghana", "Cote d'Ivoire", "Tanzania"),       score = c(1, 1, 1),       stringsAsFactors = FALSE     )   ) }  translated$file #>   country_label generated_CMID generated_CMName score #> 1         Ghana            SM1            Ghana     1 #> 2  Cote dIvoire            SM2    Cote d'Ivoire     1 #> 3      Tanzania            SM3         Tanzania     1

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
code: translated_df <- translated$file  if (!is.data.frame(translated_df) || !"generated_CMID" %in% names(translated_df)) {   message("No `generated_CMID` column found in translation output; verify API output shape before QA checks.") } else {   # Rows without a CMID assignment   translated_df[is.na(translated_df$generated_CMID), , drop = FALSE]    # Simple duplicate check by assigned CMID   sort(table(translated_df$generated_CMID), decreasing = TRUE) } #>  #> SM1 SM2 SM3  #>   1   1   1

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
code: if (run_live) {   left_df <- data.frame(     datasetID = "SD1",     country = c("Ghana", "Tanzania"),     GID = c("GHA", "TZA"),     metric_left = c(10, 20),     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   )    right_df <- data.frame(     datasetID = "SD2",     country = c("Ghana", "Tanzania"),     geonameid = c("2300660", "149590"),     metric_right = c(2, 5),     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   )    joined <- joinDatasets(     database = "SocioMap",     joinLeft = left_df,     joinRight = right_df,     domain = "CATEGORY"   ) } else {   joined <- data.frame(     generated_CMID = c("SM1", "SM3"),     left_metric = c(10, 20),     right_metric = c(2, 5),     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   ) }  joined #>   generated_CMID left_metric right_metric #> 1            SM1          10            2 #> 2            SM3          20            5

title: CatMapR End-to-End Workflow
text: Write operations require valid API key tied registered CatMapper account shown template . server identifies acting user API key enforces permissions write endpoints. CatMapR manage username/password login flows. Key format depends upload mode: = "standard" (recommended) expects full key expressions selected key column (example VARIABLE == VALUE). = "simple" supported ao = "add_uses" expects raw values (example eth:yoruba) without ==. preformatted key expressions provided = "simple", CatMapR raises error requires = "standard". upload submission, CatMapR automatically triggers contextual USES relationship refresh graph database based USES properties connect CMIDs. trigger fire--forget polled completion.
code: upload_payload <- data.frame(   CMName = "Yoruba",   Name = "Yoruba",   CMID = "",   Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",   datasetID = "SD1",   label = "ETHNICITY",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  result <- submitEditUpload(   df = upload_payload,   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     alternateCategoryNamesColumns = character(0),     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_uses",   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY"),   poll_interval_seconds = 1,   timeout_seconds = 600 )  head(result) update_add_payload <- data.frame(   CMID = "SM123",   Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",   datasetID = "SD1",   variable = "CeramicType",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  submitEditUpload(   df = update_add_payload,   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "update_add",   optionalProperties = c("variable"),   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY") )

title: CatMapR Safe Upload Patterns
text: CatMapR upload flows usually asynchronous can mutate production metadata. vignette focuses safe defaults repeatable patterns.

title: CatMapR Safe Upload Patterns
text: = "standard" (recommended): provide fully formed Key expressions Type == Adamana Brown. = "simple": valid ao = "add_uses" raw key values without ==.

what: Full ao to Edit GUI mapping
title: CatMapR Safe Upload Patterns
text: crosswalk maps CatMapR ao values exact labels shown CatMapper Edit page (Advanced upload options). Notes: = "simple" supported ao = "add_uses". = "standard", required columns vary ao validated upload.

title: CatMapR Safe Upload Patterns
code: build_key("Type", "Adamana Brown") normalize_key("Key == Region == Flagstaff") is_normalized_key("Region == Flagstaff")

title: CatMapR Safe Upload Patterns
code: payload <- data.frame(   CMName = "Yoruba",   Name = "Yoruba",   CMID = "",   Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",   datasetID = "SD1",   label = "ETHNICITY",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  result <- submitEditUpload(   df = payload,   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_uses",   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY") )  head(result)

title: CatMapR Safe Upload Patterns
code: update_add_payload <- data.frame(   CMID = "SM123",   Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",   datasetID = "SD1",   variable = "CeramicType",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  submitEditUpload(   df = update_add_payload,   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "update_add",   optionalProperties = c("variable"),   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY") )

title: CatMapR Safe Upload Patterns
code: update_replace_payload <- data.frame(   CMID = "SM123",   Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",   NewKey = "Type == Tusayan Gray",   datasetID = "SD1",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  submitEditUpload(   df = update_replace_payload,   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "update_replace",   optionalProperties = c("NewKey"),   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY") )

title: Authors and Citation
text: Robert J. Bischoff. Maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Bischoff RJ (2026). CatMapR: Interface CatMapper API. R package version 0.1.2.9000, https://catmapper.org, https://github.com/ProjectCatMapper/CatMapR, https://projectcatmapper.github.io/CatMapR/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {CatMapR: Interface to the CatMapper API},   author = {Robert J. Bischoff},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.2.9000,     https://catmapper.org,     https://github.com/ProjectCatMapper/CatMapR},   url = {https://projectcatmapper.github.io/CatMapR/}, }

title: CatMapR
text: Project page (package docs): https://projectcatmapper.github.io/CatMapR/ site contains CatMapR package documentation, including function reference pages, articles, usage guidance.  CatMapR R package provides interface CatMapper API, facilitating access dataset catalog metadata, categories, entities managed within CatMapper’s systems, including SocioMap ArchaMap. CatMapper organizes complex category systems—ethnicities, languages, religions, political districts, artifacts—frequently used social science archaeological research. package allows users : Retrieve dataset catalog metadata CatMapper databases. Search specific categories entities obtain detailed information. Translate terms within datasets based domain-specific categories, enabling data consistency integration across diverse datasets. Discover domain property metadata used CatMapper deployments. Create join datasets across different domains integrated analysis. Submit authenticated edit/upload operations using API-key-based write access.

title: CatMapR
text: Currently, CatMapR available GitHub. install , use following commands R:
code: # Install remotes if not already installed install.packages("remotes")  # Install CatMapR from GitHub remotes::install_github("projectCatMapper/CatMapR")

title: CatMapR
text: listDatasetMetadata(): List dataset catalog metadata SocioMap ArchaMap. getDatasetMetadata(): Retrieve metadata specific dataset CMID. CMIDinfo(): Fetch details specific entity CatMapper ID (CMID). searchDatabase(): Search terms within database, optionally filtering domain, property, year, context. translate(): Translate terms within data frames matching specified properties domains. createLinkfile(): Propose merge keys selected datasets within category domain. joinDatasets(): Join two aligned datasets CatMapper matching infrastructure. getDomains(): Retrieve CatMapper domain/subdomain metadata. getUploadProperties(): Retrieve upload-oriented property metadata grouped node USES relationship fields. getProperties(): Retrieve flattened property metadata API deployments expose /metadata/properties/<database>. build_key(): Build upload-ready key expressions FIELD == VALUE format. normalize_key(): Normalize stored-form keys reuse upload workflows. is_normalized_key(): Check whether key values upload-ready expressions. prepare_edit_upload(): Validate upload payload shape mode write calls. uploadInputNodes(): Upload edit-page rows CatMapper’s /uploadInputNodes endpoint (write operation; API key required). submitEditUpload(): Run edit upload flow automatically trigger waiting-USES contextual relationship refresh background.

title: CatMapR
text: allDatasets(): Legacy-compatible alias listDatasetMetadata(). datasetInfo(): Legacy-compatible alias getDatasetMetadata().

title: CatMapR
text: callAPI(): Internal helper used exported wrappers. part preferred user-facing API.

title: CatMapR
text: getUploadProperties() targets canonical production API intended upload/edit introspection. getProperties() depends deployments expose GET /metadata/properties/<database>. rollout, deployments may support getUploadProperties() getProperties().

title: CatMapR
text: Returns metadata API responses, including dataset catalog fields (example CMID, CMName, citations, relationships), category matches, translation/join outputs, metadata/property tables. download dataset source files managed outside CatMapper. User-owned raw datasets remain external inputs R workflow.

title: CatMapR
text: Set CATMAPR_API_URL point different CatMapper API deployment:
code: Sys.setenv(CATMAPR_API_URL = "https://api.catmapper.org")

title: CatMapR
text: Write endpoints (example uploads) require valid API key registered CatMapper account: CatMapR reads CATMAPR_API_KEY first, falls back CATMAPPER_API_KEY needed. get API key: https://catmapper.org/help/API.html#api-key-access write upload calls, CatMapper identifies acting user API key server side. Server-side permissions determine whether user can run requested write action. CatMapR implement username/password login flows; sends API-key-authenticated requests write uploads.
code: Sys.setenv(CATMAPR_API_KEY = "cmk_your_api_key")

title: CatMapR
code: # Create a linkfile to merge datasets based on the ETHNICITY domain merged_data <- createLinkfile(   categoryLabel = "ETHNICITY",   datasetChoices = c("SD5", "SD6"),   database = "SocioMap",   equivalence = "standard" ) print(merged_data)

title: CatMapR
code: # Join two datasets by matching keys in the SocioMap database joinLeft <- data.frame(datasetID = "SD1", country = "Afghanistan", GID = "AFG", val0 = 1) joinRight <- data.frame(datasetID = "SD2", country = "Afghanistan", geonameid = "1149361", val1 = 2) joined_data <- joinDatasets(   database = "SocioMap",   joinLeft = joinLeft,   joinRight = joinRight,   domain = "CATEGORY" ) print(joined_data)

title: CatMapR
code: # Search for the term "Afghanistan" in the ETHNICITY domain of SocioMap search_results <- searchDatabase(   database = "SocioMap",   domain = "ETHNICITY",   term = "Afghanistan",   property = "Name" ) print(search_results$data)

title: CatMapR
code: # Translate a dataframe containing a "country" column, matching with SocioMap's ADM0 domain df <- data.frame(country = "Afghanistan") translated_df <- translate(   rows = df,   database = "SocioMap",   domain = "ADM0",   term = "country",   property = "Name" ) print(translated_df$file)

title: CatMapR
text: Key format depends upload mode: = "standard" (recommended): Key values must already full expressions like VARIABLE == VALUE (may include &&). = "simple": supported ao = "add_uses" key values must raw values (example eth:yoruba) ==. = "simple" receives preformatted keys (contains ==), CatMapR raises error requires = "standard". upload submission, CatMapR automatically triggers contextual USES relationship refresh graph database based USES properties connect CMIDs. refresh fire--forget polled completion. metadata reuse, normalize stored-form keys upload:
code: normalize_key("Key == Region == Flagstaff") # "Region == Flagstaff"

title: CatMapR
code: upload_payload <- data.frame(   CMName = "Yoruba",   Name = "Yoruba",   CMID = "",   Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",   datasetID = "SD1",   label = "ETHNICITY",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  result <- submitEditUpload(   df = upload_payload,   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     alternateCategoryNamesColumns = character(0),     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_uses",   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY"),   poll_interval_seconds = 1,   timeout_seconds = 600 )  head(result)

code: update_add_payload <- data.frame(   CMID = "SM123",   Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",   datasetID = "SD1",   variable = "CeramicType",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  submitEditUpload(   df = update_add_payload,   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "update_add",   optionalProperties = c("variable"),   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY") )

what: Merge Template Endpoints (No API Key Required)
title: CatMapR
text: merge-template endpoints used CatMapperJS available without API key. CatMapR exposes wrappers main read generate flows:
code: # Fetch merge-template rows for a dataset template_rows <- getMergingTemplate(   database = "ArchaMap",   datasetID = "AD947" )  # Fetch the MERGING/STACK summary payload used by the node page template_summary <- getMergingTemplateSummary(   database = "ArchaMap",   cmid = "AMM1" )  # Generate merge syntax files from a template data frame syntax_result <- createMergeSyntax(   template = template_rows,   database = "ArchaMap" )  print(syntax_result$download)

title: Call API — callAPI
text: Helper function call CatMapper API.

title: Call API — callAPI
code: callAPI(   endpoint,   parameters,   request = "GET",   url = NULL,   type = "default",   headers = NULL )

title: Call API — callAPI
text: endpoint API endpoint parameters API parameters request GET POST url API URL override. NULL, CATMAPR_API_URL used set, otherwise "https://api.catmapper.org". type default stream headers Optional named list request headers, example list("X-API-Key" = "cmk_...").

title: Call API — callAPI
text: API response

title: Call API — callAPI
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ CatMapR:::callAPI(   endpoint = "search",   parameters = list(     term = "Dan",     database = "SocioMap",     property = "Name",     domain = "ETHNICITY"   ),   request = "GET" ) } # }

what: Create Linkfile from Dataset CMIDs — createLinkfile
title: Create Linkfile from Dataset CMIDs — createLinkfile
text: function propose merge based category domain selected datasets. processes response returns list dictionaries containing proposed merge information.

title: Create Linkfile from Dataset CMIDs — createLinkfile
code: createLinkfile(   categoryLabel,   datasetChoices,   database = "SocioMap",   intersection = FALSE,   equivalence = "standard",   mergelevel = 2,   resultFormat = "key-to-key",   selectedKeyvariable = list() )

title: Create Linkfile from Dataset CMIDs — createLinkfile
text: categoryLabel Character string specifying category domain merge. datasetChoices Character vector comma-separated string dataset CMIDs. database Character string specifying database use. (default: "SocioMap" – "ArchaMap" option) intersection Boolean value specifying whether return intersection datasets categories. (default: FALSE) equivalence Merge mode, either "standard" "extended". mergelevel Number CONTAINS hops use equivalence = "extended". resultFormat Output format expected API ("key--key", "key--category", "category--category"). selectedKeyvariable Named list key prefixes used filtering extended mode.

title: Create Linkfile from Dataset CMIDs — createLinkfile
text: Dataframe containing proposed merge information. datasetID: Character string representing dataset ID. Key: Character string representing unique identifier merge. CMName: Character string representing category name. CMID: Character string representing category ID. Name: Character string representing semicolon-separated list dataset names.

title: Create Linkfile from Dataset CMIDs — createLinkfile
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ categoryLabel <- c("ETHNICITY") datasetChoices <- c("SD5", "SD6") merged_data <- createLinkfile(categoryLabel, datasetChoices, equivalence = "standard") } # }

what: Generate Merge Syntax Files from a Merging Template — createMergeSyntax
title: Generate Merge Syntax Files from a Merging Template — createMergeSyntax
text: Submit merge template unauthenticated merge-syntax endpoint. mirrors CatMapperJS Generate Merge Files action merge template page require API key.

title: Generate Merge Syntax Files from a Merging Template — createMergeSyntax
code: createMergeSyntax(template, database, url = NULL)

title: Generate Merge Syntax Files from a Merging Template — createMergeSyntax
text: template Merge-template rows data frame list row objects. database Target database, typically "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". url API URL override. NULL, CATMAPR_API_URL used set.

title: Generate Merge Syntax Files from a Merging Template — createMergeSyntax
text: Parsed API response. success typically contains message download object downloadable hash.

title: Generate Merge Syntax Files from a Merging Template — createMergeSyntax
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ template <- data.frame(   mergingID = "AMM1",   datasetID = "AD1",   filePath = "/mnt/storage/app/example.csv",   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  result <- createMergeSyntax(template = template, database = "ArchaMap") result$download } # }

what: Retrieve Dataset Metadata by CMID — datasetInfo
title: Retrieve Dataset Metadata by CMID — datasetInfo
text: function retrieves dataset metadata based given CMID (CatMapperID) specified database, optional domain filter. fetches dataset relationships metadata properties associated specified CMID.

title: Retrieve Dataset Metadata by CMID — datasetInfo
code: datasetInfo(database, CMID, domain = "CATEGORY", children = NULL)

title: Retrieve Dataset Metadata by CMID — datasetInfo
text: database string specifying database search . Valid options "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". CMID CMID dataset retrieve information (e.g., "SD1" "AD1"). domain (Optional) category filter dataset relationships. Defaults "CATEGORY" specified. children (Optional) TRUE, include child datasets query.

title: Retrieve Dataset Metadata by CMID — datasetInfo
text: list containing dataset metadata details, error message request fails. function returns metadata records, raw dataset files.

title: Retrieve Dataset Metadata by CMID — datasetInfo
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ datasetInfo(database = "SocioMap", CMID = "SD1", domain = "CATEGORY") datasetInfo(database = "ArchaMap", CMID = "AD1") } # }

what: Get Dataset Metadata by CMID — getDatasetMetadata
title: Get Dataset Metadata by CMID — getDatasetMetadata
text: Preferred metadata-focused alias datasetInfo(). function returns dataset metadata records, raw dataset files. Returned Key values can stored-form keys (example prefixed Key == ) may need normalization reuse upload workflows.

title: Get Dataset Metadata by CMID — getDatasetMetadata
code: getDatasetMetadata(database, CMID, domain = "CATEGORY", children = NULL)

title: Get Dataset Metadata by CMID — getDatasetMetadata
text: database string specifying database search . Valid options "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". CMID CMID dataset retrieve information (e.g., "SD1" "AD1"). domain (Optional) category filter dataset relationships. Defaults "CATEGORY" specified. children (Optional) TRUE, include child datasets query.

title: Get Dataset Metadata by CMID — getDatasetMetadata
text: list containing dataset metadata details, error message request fails.

title: Get Dataset Metadata by CMID — getDatasetMetadata
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ getDatasetMetadata(database = "SocioMap", CMID = "SD1", domain = "CATEGORY") getDatasetMetadata(database = "ArchaMap", CMID = "AD1") } # }

what: Retrieve Domain Metadata from a Specified Database — getDomains
title: Retrieve Domain Metadata from a Specified Database — getDomains

title: Retrieve Domain Metadata from a Specified Database — getDomains
code: getDomains(database = "SocioMap", advanced = FALSE)

title: Retrieve Domain Metadata from a Specified Database — getDomains
text: database string specifying database retrieve domains. Valid options "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". advanced Logical; TRUE, return richer metadata fields available. Defaults FALSE.

title: Retrieve Domain Metadata from a Specified Database — getDomains
text: data frame domain metadata. default, result contains columns domain, subdomain, description. advanced = TRUE, additional metadata columns returned API preserved.

title: Retrieve Domain Metadata from a Specified Database — getDomains
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ getDomains(database = "SocioMap") getDomains(database = "ArchaMap", advanced = TRUE) } # }

what: Check Whether Keys Are Normalized — is_normalized_key
title: Check Whether Keys Are Normalized — is_normalized_key
text: Test whether key strings already normalized CatMapper expression form.

code: is_normalized_key(key)

title: Check Whether Keys Are Normalized — is_normalized_key
text: key Character vector key expressions.

title: Check Whether Keys Are Normalized — is_normalized_key
text: Logical vector (TRUE normalized).

title: Check Whether Keys Are Normalized — is_normalized_key
code: is_normalized_key("Region == Flagstaff") #> [1] TRUE is_normalized_key("Key == Region == Flagstaff") #> [1] FALSE

title: Join Datasets by Key — joinDatasets
text: function calls CatMapper API join two datasets based specified parameters. retrieves translated keys database returns joined data CMID CMName. function requires column named 'datasetID' datasets CMID translated dataset. also requires columns used create 'Key' used translation. example, Key GADM dataset 'SD1' 'GID: AFG', 'Key' column 'GID' dataset.

title: Join Datasets by Key — joinDatasets
code: joinDatasets(database, joinLeft, joinRight, domain = "CATEGORY")

title: Join Datasets by Key — joinDatasets
text: database string specifying database use, either "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". joinLeft data frame representing left dataset "datasetID" column relevant columns. joinRight data frame representing right dataset "datasetID" column relevant columns. domain Category domain label use joining keys (default: "CATEGORY").

title: Join Datasets by Key — joinDatasets
text: data frame containing joined datasets error message request fails.

title: Join Datasets by Key — joinDatasets
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ joinLeft = data.frame(datasetID = "SD1", country = "Afghanistan", GID = "AFG", val0 = 1) joinRight = data.frame(datasetID = "SD2", country = "Afghanistan", geonameid = "1149361", val1 = 2) joinDatasets("SocioMap", joinLeft, joinRight, domain = "CATEGORY") } # }

title: Normalize Key Expressions — normalize_key
text: Normalize key strings removing stored-form prefixes (example Key == ), trimming whitespace around separators, standardizing &&-joined segments.

title: Normalize Key Expressions — normalize_key
code: normalize_key(key)

title: Normalize Key Expressions — normalize_key
text: key Character vector key expressions.

title: Normalize Key Expressions — normalize_key
text: Character vector normalized key expressions.

title: Normalize Key Expressions — normalize_key
code: normalize_key("Key == Region == Flagstaff") #> [1] "Region == Flagstaff" normalize_key(" Region==Flagstaff  && Type== Adamana Brown ") #> [1] "Region == Flagstaff && Type == Adamana Brown"

what: Prepare Edit Upload Payload Components — prepare_edit_upload
title: Prepare Edit Upload Payload Components — prepare_edit_upload
text: Validates upload mode, operation, formData mappings, key safety sending write requests.

title: Prepare Edit Upload Payload Components — prepare_edit_upload
code: prepare_edit_upload(   df,   formData = list(),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_node",   allContext = list(),   optionalProperties = NULL,   mergingType = "0",   database = "SocioMap",   fail_on_simple_mismatch = TRUE )

title: Prepare Edit Upload Payload Components — prepare_edit_upload
text: df Data frame list row objects upload. formData Named list matching edit-page formData payload. Upload mode, usually "standard" "simple". ao Advanced upload option. Supported values map directly CatMapper Edit-page Advanced options: "add_node" = "Adding new node every row" "add_uses" = "Adding new uses ties (old new nodes)" "update_add" = "Updating existing USES –add add properties" "update_replace" = "Updating existing USES –replace one property" allContext Optional vector/list contextual columns. optionalProperties Optional vector/list alias allContext. mergingType Optional merging mode used merge upload workflows. database Target database, typically "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". fail_on_simple_mismatch Internal guard; TRUE, simple-mode restrictions strictly enforced.

title: Prepare Edit Upload Payload Components — prepare_edit_upload
text: named list validated upload components.

text: Resolve CatMapper API URL

code: resolve_api_url(url = NULL)

title: Resolve CatMapper API URL — resolve_api_url
text: url API URL override. NULL, CATMAPR_API_URL used set, otherwise "https://api.catmapper.org".

title: Resolve CatMapper API URL — resolve_api_url
text: Resolved base API URL.

title: Search — searchDatabase
text: Search term database retrieve CMID (CatMapperID), CMName (CatMapper Name), information matches.

code: searchDatabase(   database,   domain = NULL,   term = NULL,   property = "Name",   yearStart = NULL,   yearEnd = NULL,   country = NULL,   context = NULL,   dataset = NULL,   query = "false",   limit = 1000 )

title: Search — searchDatabase
text: database name database (SocioMap ArchaMap) domain name category domain search (DISTRICT, ETHNICITY, etc.) term search term ("Afghanistan") property property search (Name, CMID, Key) yearStart year search start yearEnd year search end country country search (must CMID) context context search (e.g., hierarchical category state county–must CMID) dataset dataset search (must dataset CMID) query return query instead results ('true' 'false') limit limit number results (currently ignored API capped 10,000 server-side)

title: Search — searchDatabase
text: list data count elements.

title: Search — searchDatabase
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ searchDatabase(database = "SocioMap", domain = "ETHNICITY", term = "Dan", property = "Name") } # }

what: Submit Edit Upload and Refresh Queue — submitEditUpload
title: Submit Edit Upload and Refresh Queue — submitEditUpload
text: Convenience wrapper executes CatMapperJS edit-page flow. uploads rows via /uploadInputNodes triggers waiting-USES contextual relationship refresh fire--forget mode. write flow requires valid API key upload calls, permissions enforced server.

title: Submit Edit Upload and Refresh Queue — submitEditUpload
code: submitEditUpload(   df,   database,   formData = list(),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_node",   addoptions = list(district = FALSE, recordyear = FALSE),   allContext = list(),   optionalProperties = NULL,   mergingType = "0",   api_key = NULL,   refresh_waiting_uses = TRUE,   poll_interval_seconds = 1,   timeout_seconds = 600,   url = NULL )

title: Submit Edit Upload and Refresh Queue — submitEditUpload
text: df Data frame list row objects upload. database Target database, typically "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". formData Named list matching edit-page formData payload. Upload mode, usually "standard" "simple". Use "standard" upload key values already full key expressions (example VARIABLE == VALUE). Use "simple" key values raw terms (example eth:yoruba) without == expression. ao Advanced upload option. Supported values map directly CatMapper Edit-page Advanced options: "add_node" = "Adding new node every row" "add_uses" = "Adding new uses ties (old new nodes)" "update_add" = "Updating existing USES –add add properties" "update_replace" = "Updating existing USES –replace one property" addoptions Named list district recordyear booleans. allContext Optional vector/list contextual columns. optionalProperties Optional vector/list alias allContext. provided, value used upload property list. mergingType Optional merging mode used merge upload workflows. api_key API key used authenticated write actions. NULL, CATMAPR_API_KEY used. refresh_waiting_uses TRUE, ensure waiting-USES refresh triggered upload without polling completion. poll_interval_seconds Polling interval seconds waiting queued upload tasks. timeout_seconds Maximum seconds wait upload completion. url API URL override. NULL, CATMAPR_API_URL used set.

title: Submit Edit Upload and Refresh Queue — submitEditUpload
text: data frame built upload task result rows returned API.

title: Submit Edit Upload and Refresh Queue — submitEditUpload
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ result <- submitEditUpload(   df = data.frame(     CMName = "Yoruba",     Name = "Yoruba",     CMID = "",     Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",     datasetID = "SD1",     label = "ETHNICITY",     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   ),   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_uses",   poll_interval_seconds = 1,   timeout_seconds = 600,   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY") ) head(result) } # }

title: Translate — translate
text: function translate dataframe matching specified term property database.

title: Translate — translate
code: translate(   rows,   database,   term,   property = "Name",   domain = "CATEGORY",   context = NULL,   country = NULL,   dataset = NULL,   yearStart = NULL,   yearEnd = NULL,   key = "false",   query = "false",   countsamename = FALSE,   uniqueRows = TRUE )

title: Translate — translate
text: rows data frame translate database database use (SocioMap ArchaMap) term column name translate property property search (Name, CMID, Key) domain name category domain search (DISTRICT, ETHNICITY, etc.) context column name context search (CMID) country column name country search (CMID) dataset column name dataset search (dataset CMID) yearStart year search start yearEnd year search end key include Key values results ('true' 'false') query return query instead results countsamename count duplicate matching names scoring logic uniqueRows deduplicate identical input rows matching

title: Translate — translate
text: list file order API.

title: Translate — translate
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ df = data.frame(country = "Afghanistan") translate(   rows = df,   database = "SocioMap",   domain = "ADM0",   term = "country",   property = "Name",   yearStart = NULL,   yearEnd = NULL,   country = NULL,   context = NULL,   query = "false" ) } # }

what: Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper — uploadInputNodes
title: Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper — uploadInputNodes
text: Mirrors CatMapperJS edit-page upload call /uploadInputNodes. wrapper intended write operations requires valid API key tied registered CatMapper account. Server-side permissions determine whether authenticated user can perform requested write action.

title: Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper — uploadInputNodes
code: uploadInputNodes(   df,   database,   formData = list(),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_node",   addoptions = list(district = FALSE, recordyear = FALSE),   allContext = list(),   optionalProperties = NULL,   mergingType = "0",   api_key = NULL,   poll_interval_seconds = 1,   timeout_seconds = 600,   url = NULL )

title: Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper — uploadInputNodes
text: df Data frame list row objects upload. database Target database, typically "SocioMap" "ArchaMap". formData Named list matching edit-page formData payload. Upload mode, usually "standard" "simple". Use "standard" upload key values already full key expressions (example VARIABLE == VALUE). Use "simple" key values raw terms (example eth:yoruba) without == expression. ao Advanced upload option. Supported values map directly CatMapper Edit-page Advanced options: "add_node" = "Adding new node every row" "add_uses" = "Adding new uses ties (old new nodes)" "update_add" = "Updating existing USES –add add properties" "update_replace" = "Updating existing USES –replace one property" addoptions Named list district recordyear booleans. allContext Optional vector/list contextual columns. optionalProperties Optional vector/list alias allContext. provided, value used upload property list. mergingType Optional merging mode used merge upload workflows. api_key API key used authenticated write actions. NULL, CATMAPR_API_KEY used. poll_interval_seconds Polling interval seconds waiting queued upload tasks. timeout_seconds Maximum seconds wait upload completion. url API URL override. NULL, CATMAPR_API_URL used set.

title: Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper — uploadInputNodes
text: data frame built upload task result rows returned API.

title: Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper — uploadInputNodes
text: CatMapR manage username/password login flows. sends API-key-authenticated requests CatMapper API identifies acting user server side. = "simple", ao = "add_uses" supported key values selected key column must raw values without ==. full ao crosswalk examples, see vignette("safe-upload-patterns", package = "CatMapR").

title: Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper — uploadInputNodes
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ upload_result <- uploadInputNodes(   df = data.frame(     CMName = "Yoruba",     Name = "Yoruba",     CMID = "",     Key = "Type == Adamana Brown",     datasetID = "SD1",     label = "ETHNICITY",     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   ),   database = "SocioMap",   formData = list(     domain = "ETHNICITY",     subdomain = "ETHNICITY",     datasetID = "SD1",     cmNameColumn = "CMName",     categoryNamesColumn = "Name",     alternateCategoryNamesColumns = character(0),     cmidColumn = "CMID",     keyColumn = "Key"   ),   so = "standard",   ao = "add_uses",   poll_interval_seconds = 1,   timeout_seconds = 600,   api_key = Sys.getenv("CATMAPR_API_KEY") ) head(upload_result) } # }

title: CatMapR 0.1.2.9000 (unreleased; noted 2026-03-27)
text: Added metadata-introspection wrappers getDomains(), getProperties(), getUploadProperties(). Added tests metadata/property wrapper behavior, endpoint construction, API error handling. Declared R (>= 4.1.0) explicitly match use native pipe operator. Removed SSL peer-verification override callAPI(). Refreshed README, vignette, pkgdown reference structure, stability notes better reflect current exported API. Cleaned packaging hygiene excluding generated vignette outputs builds removing stale tracked build artifacts repo. Note: getProperties() depends API deployments expose /metadata/properties/<database>. rollout, deployments may support getUploadProperties() getProperties().

title: CatMapR 0.1.2 (2026-03-18)
text: Normalized package metadata CRAN submission (Title, Version, License, URL, BugReports). Standardized top-level package files CRAN checks (README.md) added build ignore rules local check artifacts. Made API examples CRAN-safe wrapping network calls \\dontrun{}. Added central input-validation helpers wired exported API wrappers clearer error messages safer inputs. Added tests covering new validation behavior. Added API stability contract freeze 0.1.x public interface. Added CRAN submission comments draft (cran-comments.md).
